title: Document governance and weltgewebe handoff boundary
goal: Define source, curation, privacy and taxonomy policy plus the disabled-by-default handoff boundary to weltgewebe.

acceptance.assertion: Source and license policy distinguishes curated entries from import candidates.
Location precision defaults and sensitive-place rules are documented.
weltgewebe handoff requires explicit project identity for join/manage actions and is disabled by default.

validated_acceptance.source-policy: PR #13 defines source classes and curation states, distinguishes fixture/candidate/curated/archived entries, and validates source/license/provenance requirements.
validated_acceptance.privacy-policy: PR #12 and the current CommonProject schema define map/aether/profile projections and location privacy modes; validators enforce hidden/approximate/exact and disabled handoff profile states.
validated_acceptance.handoff-contract: PR #21 defines the weltgewebe handoff as read-only, disabled by default, requiring explicit project identity, URL, curated state and neutral labels before any enabled handoff.

validation: Commonworld PR #12 merged as 1b9d6a9473ef9ace183ecd7d73bede330c8444f5 with make validate / 50 tests.
Commonworld PR #13 merged as 4882c8f86d35e997c60857a60cc110778d9375a9 with make validate / 62 tests.
Commonworld PR #21 merged as 97be07608931f6db47cae15b261b19c78376d238 with make validate / 99 tests.
Current Commonworld main still carries source curation, projection and handoff validators/tests.
